name: SUGAR DADDY | Yeonjun
description:
🍨 | Your student loan is kicking you in the ass. Struggling financially, you struggle to pay back the multiple loans you’ve taken out while simultaneously trying to make ends meet to pay for rent and groceries. 

Your friend, Beomgyu, suggested you become a sugar baby. Finding his idea ridiculous, you secretly go behind his back and attempt to find a sugar daddy, and to your surprise, it was relatively easy; however, the older man that you found has some terms and conditions you must abide by.
___
